module.name: bmad-dl-lifecycle
module.description: Agentic workflows for the Deep Learning development lifecycle.

skills.name: initiation
skills.description: Produces PRD for a new ML/DL project.

skills.name: eda
skills.description: Performs exploratory data analysis, establishes baselines, and produces an EDA report with domain expert interpretations to constrain architectural decisions.

skills.name: architecture
skills.description: Produces system architecture grounded in EDA findings and Research Thesis.

skills.name: detailed-design
skills.description: Produces INF-* infrastructure tasks and EXP-* experiment tasks from architecture and EDA constraints.

skills.name: techspec
skills.description: Produces a pre-experiment contract with locked parameter search space, compute budget, and tiered success criteria before any training begins.

skills.name: infra
skills.description: Builds all project infrastructure (data pipeline, training loop, experiment tracking, evaluation harness, inference API) before experiments begin. Handles INF-* tasks. Infrastructure is done when smoke test passes with dummy data.

skills.name: experiment
skills.description: Executes training runs against a locked TECHSPEC, logs all metrics and artifacts to the experiment tracker (W&B/MLflow/ClearML), and produces the Experiment Log. Handles EXP-* tasks. Requires bmad-dl-infra to be complete first.

skills.name: analysis
skills.description: Analyzes experiment results from tracking tool (W&B/MLflow/ClearML), evaluates against TECHSPEC tiers, verifies hypothesis verdict with Domain Expert.

skills.name: hparam
skills.description: Runs structured hyperparameter optimization (Optuna, W&B Sweeps, Ray Tune, ClearML HPO) after a baseline architecture is confirmed. Conditional stage — run only after Analysis confirms the baseline meets the TECHSPEC minimum viable tier.

skills.name: revision
skills.description: Conducts document audit across Thesis, PRD, Architecture and Detailed Design; formulates next hypothesis with Domain Expert; generates new INF-* and EXP-* tasks for next cycle.

skills.name: implementation
skills.description: DEPRECATED in v2.0.0. Use bmad-dl-infra for INF-* tasks and bmad-dl-experiment for EXP-* tasks.

skills.name: advise
skills.description: Searches past experiments, retrospectives, and TECHSPECs to surface validated parameters and failure warnings before starting new work. Run before any new experiment or EDA cycle.

skills.name: retrospective
skills.description: Captures session learnings as a structured knowledge document. Run at the end of any implementation or analysis session to preserve what worked, what failed, and exact parameters for future /bmad-dl-advise discovery.
